codeReview.summary: The app-layout-and-navigation feature is fully implemented according to specifications. The root layout wraps all pages with AppLayout, the navigation header correctly reads the business name from localStorage with 'I&M HVAC' as default, brand styling (butter-yellow #F5D76E accent, dark text #1a1a1a) is applied consistently, mobile responsiveness is implemented with flex-col/sm:flex-row, active links are visually distinguished with aria-current support, and placeholder pages exist for /calls and /settings. Tests cover all key functionality including localStorage loading, active link state, and responsive layout classes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md lists 'npx next lint' as the lint command, but Next.js 16 in this project does not support this subcommand. The project uses 'npm run lint' (which runs 'eslint .') instead. This was already noted by previous workers but AGENTS.md hasn't been updated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript shows: 'Set-Location ... npx next lint' failed with 'Invalid project directory provided, no such directory'. Worker used 'npm run lint' instead which passed. This pattern was also noted in project-scaffolding and api-routes features.

summary: The app-layout-and-navigation feature passes review. All requirements are met: root layout with navigation header, business name from localStorage with proper default, brand styling (butter-yellow accent, dark text, light background), active link highlighting, mobile responsiveness, placeholder pages for /calls and /settings, Next.js Link usage, and comprehensive test coverage. The implementation follows established patterns and conventions documented in AGENTS.md.
